steps.title: Use the biomass scale
steps.content: The graph measures global biomass in millions of metric tons. To complete the sentence, the species with the tallest bar is needed.

steps.title: Compare the species bars
steps.content: White-tailed deer has the tallest bar, at about 2.7 million metric tons. A is lower at about 1.9 million, B is lower at about 0.6 million, and C is lower at about 1.3 million. The answer is D.
